prerequisite_concepts.name: Absolute Fitness
prerequisite_concepts.definition: Fitness measured on an absolute scale before normalization.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 归一化之前、按绝对尺度衡量的适合度。

prerequisite_concepts.name: Trait Value
prerequisite_concepts.definition: The numerical value of the phenotype or quantitative trait being modeled.
prerequisite_concepts.definition_zh: 表型或数量性状在模型中的数值。

introduced_concepts.name: Optimal Trait Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The trait value at which the fitness function reaches its optimum.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 使适合度函数达到最大值的性状取值。

introduced_concepts.name: Additive Genetic Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic contribution to an individual or trait value.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 个体或性状值中的加性遗传贡献。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness Width
introduced_concepts.definition: A scale parameter controlling how quickly fitness declines away from the optimum.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 控制性状偏离最优值时适合度下降速度的尺度参数。

introduced_concepts.name: Alpha

introduced_concepts.definition: A selection coefficient assigned to one class or genotype.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 分配给某一类别或基因型的选择系数。

introduced_concepts.name: Formula 20.18 Function
introduced_concepts.definition: A rule that maps inputs to outputs in the model.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 把输入映射为输出的规则。

introduced_concepts.name: Fitness Breeding Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic component associated with fitness.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 与适合度相关的加性遗传组成部分。

introduced_concepts.name: Trait Breeding Value
introduced_concepts.definition: The additive genetic component associated with the trait.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: 与性状相关的加性遗传组成部分。

introduced_concepts.name: E Sub W
introduced_concepts.definition: E Sub W places the symbol back in the model context: it marks the object, class, or condition being described.
introduced_concepts.definition_zh: E Sub W 帮你把符号放回模型语境中：它标记的是公式正在描述的对象、类别或条件。
